title: fischer 670532 FPF Power-Fast II 6.0 x 60 mm Chipboard Wood Screws, Pan Head with Inner Star TX, Fully Threaded, Galvanised Blue Passivated, Box of 50
features: Power-Fast II: the chipboard screw fischer Power-Fast II can be processed quickly and flexibly. Thanks to the screw tip with three ribs, the Power-Fast II screw is easy to attach and mills quickly and easily into the wood. The Power-Fast II is available with different head shapes and with a blue passivated zinc plating, which contains no harmful chrome VI and is therefore very environmentally friendly.

Versatile: the fischer Power-Fast II is universally applicable and quick and easy to install. Whether in different woods and even at small edge distances and with metal fittings, the chipboard screw fischer Power-Fast II can withstand a high load. The chipboard screw Power-Fast II is a screw with tested loads in the fischer dowel (e.g. Duopower and UX). Thanks to the sophisticated technology, the wood with the fischer Power-Fast II breaks significantly less and requires significantly less force when screwing the screw.

Time-saving: the TX drive of the Fischer Power-Fast II reduces the number of bit changes and simplifies the screwing process. Thanks to the new thread geometry of the fully threaded screw, the screw can be screwed in much faster. The increased thread pitch ensures more safety. Typically fully threaded screws are used for steel-wood connections.

Pan head: the chipboard screw Fischer Power-Fast II allows easy and easy screwing thanks to its pan head. Guaranteed safety and best hold thanks to the full surface support of the pan head on the attachment. The design with pan head is optimally suited for metal-wood connections.
Box contents: 50 x chipboard screws Power-Fast II 6.0 x 60, pan head with inner star TX full thread galvanised, blue passivated (item no. 670532) by Fischer
description: From the manufacturer PowerFast II The NEW chipboard screw for fast and flexible applications. Product Highlights The three ribs on the tip, ensure a quick bite and pre-drilling. For a fast bite and reduced splitting. The special underhead geometry with optimized double cone and milling pockets ensure less cracking in timber and less damage to metal components. The increased thread pitch significantly reduces the installation time. For fast assembly. The shank-miller in combination with the core-miller geometry is designed to reduce the installation torque. Advantages The screw geometry of the new Power-Fast II enables fast applications. Installation is easy, comfortable & flexible. The chipboard screw has significantly reduced splitting behavior in comparison with standard chipboard screws. The Power-Fast II with high performance wax coating reduces screw-in torque & allows smooth installation. The blue passivated zinc plating does not contain chrome VI. The Power-Fast II range is available in various combinations of: Countersunk or Pan Head Phillips or Inner Star TX Partial or Full Thread Length Box Size Metal on Wood Applications For metal parts to wood, e.g. metal fittings, angles, beam shoes and other metal and wood connections. The ideal solution for a clean surface finish without damage. Wood Applications The new screw geometry provides the perfect solution, no matter if hard or soft wood. For use in load-bearing wooden constructions, for the connection of solid wood parts (soft wood and hard wood) as well as glued laminated timber, cross laminated timber, veneer laminated timber, similar glued wood components and woodbased panels. Plug Applications The new Power-Fast II is suitable for use with fischer plugs (E.g DUOPOWER and UX) and recommended loads. This makes full use of the load-bearing capacity of the plug. No special screws are required. Safe and secure with fischer plugs.
